title: Trial Begins for 3 Men Accused of Arson Attacks at Starmer’s Homes
summary_full: Two Ukrainians and a Romanian were charged last year with setting fire to two buildings and a car linked to Prime Minister Keir Starmer of Britain.
summary_public: Two Ukrainians and a Romanian were charged last year with setting fire to two buildings and a car linked to Prime Minister Keir Starmer of Britain.
